x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Non-conversational catalog items cannot use Now Assist VA for guided fulfillment or AI-assisted intake. Converting items to conversational format is a high-value quick win for Now Assist enablement.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Convert high-volume catalog items to conversational format by removing multi-row variable sets, client scripts, and other blockers. Navigate to Service Catalog > Catalog Administrator > Conversational Catalog Overview to identify and address non-conversational items. Target: 80%+ of catalog items with conversational_render_type=conversation.
